types.name: ROUNDING_FLOOR
types.description: Integer truncation in Solidity division or mulDiv floor, favoring the protocol when division yields user-owed amounts.

types.name: ROUNDING_CEIL
types.description: Ceiling division typically used when computing user-owed inputs (debt, shares owed).

types.name: MIXED_ROUNDING_DIRECTION
types.description: Same computation path mixes floor and ceil (deposit rounds down but redeem rounds down too, etc.).
markers: mulDiv and mulDivUp in same function

types.name: PRECISION_TRUNCATION
types.description: Narrowing casts that silently drop high bits.

types.name: MULT_BEFORE_DIV
types.description: Order-sensitive a * b / c that loses precision if divided first or overflows if multiplied first without FullMath.

types.name: CHECKED_ARITHMETIC_GAP
types.description: unchecked { } block wrapping arithmetic that can cross boundary conditions due to caller inputs; also assembly math outside Solidity 0.8 checks.
markers: SafeMath.add without overflow guard above it

types.name: ZERO_AMOUNT_PASSTHROUGH
types.description: Function accepts amount == 0 without rejecting, allowing dust griefing, event spam, share inflation boundary cases.

types.name: OWNER_ONLY
types.description: Role- or owner-gated state mutator.

types.name: SELF_CALLBACK_GATE
types.description: Function only callable when msg.sender == address(this) (multicall internals, reentering own context).

types.name: NO_ACCESS_CONTROL
types.description: external/public state mutator with no sender gate; permissionless entry.

types.name: GENESIS_BYPASS
types.description: Initializer, constructor, or first-call-only path that bypasses later restrictions.

types.name: PAUSE_GATE
types.description: Pause/circuit-breaker gate.

types.name: LOOP_STORAGE_MUTATION
types.description: Storage SSTORE inside a loop body (gas cliff + reordering hazard).

types.name: UNBOUNDED_ITERATION
types.description: Loop bound controlled by user-growable array or mapping keyset.

types.name: READ_WRITE_GAP
types.description: Read-then-call-then-write on same slot (reentrancy + TOCTOU surface).
markers: SLOAD then external call then SSTORE

types.name: DELETE_IN_LOOP
types.description: delete inside an index-based loop (iteration invariant broken).

types.name: COUNTER_INCREMENT
types.description: Monotonic counter (nonce, tokenId, requestId) that may wrap, collide, or leak ordering.

types.name: COLLECT_THEN_ITERATE
types.description: Snapshot a collection to memory then iterate (vs live iteration).

types.name: ORACLE_PRICE_DEP
types.description: Decision depends on price feed.

types.name: ORACLE_STALENESS
types.description: Oracle freshness gate with a concrete time window.

types.name: CROSS_CONTRACT_CALL
types.description: Any .call, interface call, low-level call, or delegatecall to another contract.

types.name: QUERY_DEPENDENCY
types.description: Read external contract state whose value may change between read and use.

types.name: ORACLE_ERROR_SWALLOWED
types.description: Oracle / external call wrapped in try/catch where failure is logged or skipped rather than reverted.

types.name: FIRST_DEPOSITOR_PATH
types.description: Branch for totalSupply == 0 (vault inflation vector).

types.name: PROPORTIONAL_SHARE
types.description: Share / LP = amount * supply / assets (ERC4626 style).

types.name: FEE_COMPUTATION
types.description: Fee as rate * amount with denominator constant.

types.name: SLIPPAGE_PROTECTION
types.description: Min out / max in guard supplied by caller.

types.name: PRICE_FROM_RESERVES
types.description: Price derived from pool reserves (Uni V2 spot).

types.name: PASSIVE_ORDER_GEN
types.description: Protocol-generated (not user-submitted) orders, curves, or auto-rebalance positions.

types.name: CLEARING_PRICE_SELECTION
types.description: Auction or batch-matching price choice.

types.name: MINIMUM_SIZE_CHECK
types.description: Minimum deposit/withdraw/order size.

types.name: CRON_BATCH
types.description: Keeper/upkeep batch-processor.

types.name: CANCEL_BEFORE_CREATE
types.description: Same-tx ordering where cancels process before creates (order-book flows).
markers: process cancels then creates in same tx

types.name: MULTI_HOP_CHAIN
types.description: Output of step N feeds step N+1 (swap path, route).

types.name: REPLY_ON_ERROR
types.description: try/catch handler that retains partial state on external revert.

types.name: EARLY_RETURN_BRANCH
types.description: Early return that skips later state updates or event emits.

types.name: FUND_VERIFICATION
types.description: Assertion that msg.value or received ERC20 equals expected.

types.name: REFUND_CALCULATION
types.description: Excess msg.value or unused input refunded.

types.name: MINT_AND_BURN
types.description: Internal _mint/_burn or totalSupply mutation.

types.name: DUST_ACCUMULATION
types.description: Repeated same-direction rounding inside a batch or per-position loop.

types.name: BLOCK_HEIGHT_DISCRIMINATION
types.description: Same-block vs prior-block distinction.

types.name: MAKER_TAKER_SPLIT
types.description: Different fee per order role/timing.

types.name: ORDER_ID_MANIPULATION
types.description: Packed ID encoding for sort key.

types.name: INVARIANT_PRESERVATION
types.description: Explicit invariant check (x*y>=k, totalShares tracks totalAssets).

types.name: BALANCE_ACCOUNTING
types.description: Before/after balance reconciliation or inflows == outflows + fees.

types.name: DELEGATECALL_TARGET
types.description: Delegatecall to an address whose code or trust boundary is not fully pinned (user-supplied, mutable, or selected from registry).

types.name: STORAGE_SLOT_COLLISION
types.description: Two layouts (proxy vs implementation, V1 vs V2, parent vs child in multiple-inheritance) write or read the same slot with different semantics.
markers: custom assembly sstore to fixed slot

types.name: INITIALIZER_REENTRY
types.description: initialize / reinitializer(n) can be re-called, called out of order, or called by unintended actor.

types.name: UUPS_AUTHORIZE_GAP
types.description: _authorizeUpgrade missing, empty, or gated by role that lacks timelock.

types.name: SELECTOR_CLASH
types.description: Proxy admin function selector collides with implementation function selector, or diamond facet selectors overlap.

types.name: IMPLEMENTATION_SELFDESTRUCT
types.description: Implementation contract has SELFDESTRUCT, arbitrary delegatecall, or ownable state that lets it be bricked, leaving proxy pointing at empty code.
markers: delegatecall on implementation without init lock

types.name: RAW_CALL_RETURN_IGNORED
types.description: Low-level .call / .send return value discarded (transfer assumed to succeed).

types.name: ASSEMBLY_MEMORY_UNSAFE
types.description: Inline assembly writes past free memory pointer, reads stale memory, or violates memory safety.

types.name: ARBITRARY_CALLDATA_FORWARD
types.description: Function forwards user-supplied target + calldata to .call or .delegatecall without allowlist.

types.name: RETURNDATA_BOMB
types.description: External call receives large returndata that is copied unconditionally (gas griefing).
markers: abi.decode on external return without size guard

types.name: TRANSIENT_STORAGE_LEAK
types.description: TSTORE / TLOAD (EIP-1153) leaves transient state visible across nested frames within the same tx in a way the caller did not intend.

types.name: CREATE2_ADDRESS_REUSE
types.description: CREATE2 redeployment at same address after SELFDESTRUCT (metamorphic contract), or salted-address predictability used as trust anchor.

types.name: CLASSIC_REENTRANCY
types.description: External call in a function that later writes to the same storage the call path can re-read (single-function reentrancy).

types.name: CROSS_FUNCTION_REENTRANCY
types.description: Reentrancy into a DIFFERENT function that shares state with the caller; nonReentrant on one function only.
markers: view function returns mid-call stale state

types.name: READ_ONLY_REENTRANCY
types.description: External actor reenters a view/getter of the same protocol (or a dependent consumer) during a callback; consumer trusts the view.

types.name: ERC777_HOOK_REENTRANCY
types.description: Transfer of ERC777 / ERC1363 / ERC721.safeTransfer / ERC1155 triggers receiver hook that reenters.

types.name: CALLBACK_STATE_DIVERGENCE
types.description: Protocol issues a callback (flash loan, swap callback, flash mint) whose body executes while protocol invariants are temporarily broken.

types.name: REENTRANCY_GUARD_PROXY_GAP
types.description: ReentrancyGuard state sits in implementation storage but proxy pattern or shared diamond facet lets two facets bypass the guard.
markers: multiple proxies sharing guard slot incorrectly
